subcodes.first_line: O adorned leaf! A hundred thousand handmaidens who, throughout countless years, arose to perform diverse acts of worship with manifold hardships [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مطرزه صد هزار اماء که سالهای بیشمار بانواع مشقات عبادات قیام نمودند و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @high station of the true believer, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
